title: CFTC Clears Phantom to Connect Users to Regulated Derivatives Markets
message_html: CFTC Clears Phantom to Connect Users to Regulated Derivatives Markets ...
snippet: Under the ruling, the developer of the Phantom self-custody crypto wallet avoids having to register as a broker.

title: TRON Announces Network Support on Reown SDK for Building Onchain Apps
message_html: TRON Announces Network Support on Reown SDK for Building Onchain Apps ...
snippet: TRON DAO (@trondao): TRON announced the launch of TRON Network support on @reown_ SDK, an open-source all-in-one SDK for building seamless onchain apps. The integration provides developers with a unified solution to easily incorporate TRON and EVM networks into their decentralized applications ( dAp
